report.summary: UX audited and polished today's two build-cycle pages (Crypto DCA Strategy Guide 2026, TradFi-DeFi Convergence Guide 2026). Created OG images for both, added mobile table scroll wrappers with scroll hints, ToC hover underlines, focus-visible states, aria-labels, and CTA/related-link hover effects.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added mobile-responsive table scroll wrappers (overflowX: auto + WebkitOverflowScrolling: touch) on 4 wide tables across both pages — prevents horizontal overflow on mobile for 4–5 column tables (Frequency, Platforms, Fear/Greed, RWA Categories, Investment Opportunities)
Added '← scroll →' hint text on mobile (≤640px) for scrollable tables via CSS ::after pseudo-element
Added hover underline on Table of Contents links (toc-link class) for both pages — improves discoverability of clickable items
Added focus-visible outline (2px solid #6366f1) on all ToC links, related links, and CTA buttons for keyboard navigation accessibility
Added aria-label='Table of Contents' on <nav> elements for screen reader accessibility
Added hover/focus lift effect on CTA button (DCA page) with box-shadow glow and translateY(-2px)
Added hover/focus background highlight on Related Guides links (TradFi page) with padding and border-radius for better click targets
Both pages use shared Breadcrumb component (consistent with codebase convention, unlike some earlier learn pages that used inline breadcrumbs)
Both pages already had solid base: BackToTop, StructuredData, proper heading hierarchy, semantic HTML sections with IDs

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: og-crypto-dca-strategy-guide.svg (1200x630) — dark theme with indigo→cyan gradient title, 3 stat cards (+202% BTC return, +14.4% Monday effect, 1,145% fear-based DCA), DCA accumulation chart with buy markers and area fill, topic summary bar, degen0x branding

OG image: og-tradfi-defi-convergence-guide.svg (1200x630) — dark theme with indigo→cyan gradient title, 3 stat cards ($50B+ tokenized RWAs, $1B/day JPMorgan, $1.3B BlackRock BUIDL), TradFi↔DeFi convergence flow diagram (TradFi + DeFi → OnFi → outputs), institution pills (JPMorgan/BlackRock/Goldman/Citi), topic summary

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/crypto-dca-strategy-guide-2026 — 817 lines, 10 sections + FAQ, 6 data tables, CTA to DCA Calculator. UX: Enhanced with mobile table scrolling (3 tables wrapped), ToC hover underlines, CTA focus/hover states, aria-label on nav.

/learn/tradfi-defi-convergence-guide-2026 — 723 lines, 9 sections + FAQ, 4 data tables, related guides section. UX: Enhanced with mobile table scrolling (2 tables wrapped), ToC hover underlines, related link hover/focus states, aria-label on nav.

sections.title: Notes
items: SVG OG images created — PNG conversion still needed for production social previews (metadata references .png files)
No new TypeScript errors introduced — only pre-existing errors in unrelated files (crypto-index-funds-guide, structured-data.examples)
Backlog from previous design report: 5 pages still missing OG images (megaeth, nftfi, story-protocol, solana-blinks, bitcoin-supply-shock)
